modmenu.descriptionTranslation.vulkan-ex: O Vulkan Extra visa trazer a maioria das opções atraentes do OptiFine para o Sodium; além de fornecer alguns recursos como correções visuais e outras opções de desempenho que ainda não estão disponíveis no Sodium.
modmenu.summaryTranslation.vulkan-extra: Recursos que não deveriam estar no Sodium.
options.particles.minecraft.ambient_enti: Emitido pelos beacons e seus efeitos de status.
options.particles.minecraft.angry_villag: Produzido quando villagers não conseguem cruzar ou quando uma mesa de trabalho está muito longe.
options.particles.minecraft.ash.tooltip: Flutuam no ar no bioma de Soul Sand.
options.particles.minecraft.barrier.tool: Aparece quando segurando um item Barreira.
options.particles.minecraft.block.toolti: Produzido quando blocos são quebrados ou varridos, quando golens de ferro andam, quando entidades caem de grandes alturas, quando jogadores ou gatos correm, quando um stand de armadura quebra e quando ovelhas comem mato.
options.particles.minecraft.block_crumbl: Produzido quando um Coração de Rangente é destruído, junto com o seu Rangente.
options.particles.minecraft.block_marker: Marca blocos de barreira e de luz quando segurados na mão principal.
options.particles.minecraft.bubble.toolt: Aparece ao redor de entidades se movimentando na água. Também emitido pelo laser de guardiões, peixes fora d'água, trilhas de peixe, projéteis submersos na água e olhos de ender.
options.particles.minecraft.campfire_cos: Emitido por fogueiras e fogueiras de areia da alma.
options.particles.minecraft.campfire_sig: Emitido por fogueiras e fogueiras de areia da alma colocadas em cima de um bloco de fardo de feno.
options.particles.minecraft.cloud.toolti: Produzido quando esponjas molhadas secam no nether e quando entrando em uma vila com Mau Presságio.
options.particles.minecraft.composter.to: Produzido quando adicionando itens a uma composteira.
options.particles.minecraft.crimson_spor: Flutua no ar no bioma da Floresta Carmesim.
options.particles.minecraft.crit.tooltip: Produzido por ataques críticos e certos tipos de ataque. Também segue por trás de tiros de besta e arcos carregados completamente.
options.particles.minecraft.damage_indic: Produzido quando um ataque físico atinge uma entidade.
options.particles.minecraft.dragon_breat: Emitido pelo bafo da Dragão Ender, bolas de fogo do dragão e fumaça do bafo de dragão.
options.particles.minecraft.dripping_dri: Representa gotas de lava se formando na ponta de estalactites antes de cairem.
Representa gotas de água se formando na ponta de estalactites antes que caiam.
options.particles.minecraft.dripping_hon: Representa gotas de mel se formando abaixo de colméias antes que caiam.
options.particles.minecraft.dripping_lav: Representa droplets de lava que se formam abaixo de blocos com lava em cima antes de caírem.
options.particles.minecraft.dripping_obs: Representa lágrimas que se formam em uma obsidiana chorona antes de caírem.
options.particles.minecraft.dripping_wat: Representa gotas de água se formando em folhas durante a chuva, blocos com água acima, e esponjas molhadas antes de cairem.
options.particles.minecraft.dust.tooltip: Emitido por componentes energizados por redstone como pó de redstone, tochas, repetidores, alavancas e minérios de redstone.
Produzido pelos ataques esmagadores da clava.
options.particles.minecraft.dust_plume.t: Produzido ao adicionar itens em vasos decorados.
options.particles.minecraft.egg_crack.to: Produzido quando ovos de sniffer são colocados em blocos de musgo e quando chocam.
options.particles.minecraft.elder_guardi: Exibido quando um Guardião Ancião inflige Fadiga Mineração.
options.particles.minecraft.electric_spa: Produzido por para-raios durante tempestades de trovão e quando um raio acerta um bloco de cobre.
options.particles.minecraft.enchant.tool: Flutua de estantes de livro para mesas de encantamento.
options.particles.minecraft.enchanted_hi: Produzido ao acertar uma entidade com certos encantamentos de dano (por exemplo: Afiação, Julgamento, Ruína dos Artrópodes ou Empalamento).
options.particles.minecraft.end_rod.tool: Emitido por varetas do fim e rastros por trás de tiros de shulker.
options.particles.minecraft.entity_effec: Emitido por flechas de efeito, áreas de efeito de poção, poção de efeito prolongado, magias e muitas fontes de efeitos além de beacons e canais.
options.particles.minecraft.explosion.to: Produzido por explosões e emissores de explosão. Também aparece durante alguns grandes impactos e efeitos de morte do Dragão Ender.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_drip: Produzido quando gotas de lava caem de estalactites.
Produzido quando gotas de água caem de estalactites.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_dust: Quedas de blocos afetados pela gravidade como areia cascalho.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_hone: Produzido quando gotas de mel caem de colméias.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_lava: Produzido quando gotas de lava caem de blocos com lava em cima.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_obsi: Produzido quando as lágrimas caem da obsidiana chorona.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_wate: Produced when water droplets fall from blocks with water above, from leaves during rain, and from wet sponges.
options.particles.minecraft.firefly.tool: Spawns from firefly bushes when the internal light level is 13 or lower.
options.particles.minecraft.firework.too: Trails behind fireworks and is produced when firework stars explode.
options.particles.minecraft.fishing.tool: Represents the fish trail while fishing.
options.particles.minecraft.flame.toolti: Emitted by torches, furnaces, and other fire sources. Also appears in spawners and around magma cubes.
options.particles.minecraft.flash.toolti: Produced when fireworks with firework stars explode.
options.particles.minecraft.glow_squid_i: Produced when a glow squid is hit.
options.particles.minecraft.gust.tooltip: Created when a wind charge impacts a block.
options.particles.minecraft.gust_emitter: Created when a wind charge impacts a block and emits multiple gust particles.
Created when a wind charge impacts a block and emits a small burst of gust particles.
options.particles.minecraft.happy_villag: Produced during positive interactions such as bone-mealing plants, trading, feeding animals, pollination, claiming job sites or beds, and turtle egg placement or hatching.
options.particles.minecraft.heart.toolti: Produced when taming, breeding, feeding, and when allays duplicate.
options.particles.minecraft.infested.too: Emitted by entities with the Infested effect.
options.particles.minecraft.instant_effe: Produced when Instant Health or Instant Damage potions break and trails behind spectral arrows.
options.particles.minecraft.item.tooltip: Produced when tools break, when eating, and when certain thrown or used items break (e.g., potions and Eyes of Ender).
Produced by entities with the Weaving effect.
options.particles.minecraft.item_slime.t: Produced by slimes and by entities with the Oozing effect.
options.particles.minecraft.item_snowbal: Produced when a thrown snowball breaks.
options.particles.minecraft.landing_hone: Produced when falling honey droplets land.
options.particles.minecraft.landing_lava: Produced when falling lava droplets land.
options.particles.minecraft.landing_obsi: Produced when falling obsidian tears land.
Emitted by large fire sources such as blazes and fires. Also appears when water is placed in the Nether and when lava and water create stone variants.
Appears when holding a Light item of any level.
options.particles.minecraft.mycelium.too: Appears above mycelium and trails behind phantoms’ wings.
options.particles.minecraft.nautilus.too: Floats toward conduits and toward entities targeted by a conduit.
options.particles.minecraft.note.tooltip: Produced by note blocks and jukeboxes.
options.particles.minecraft.ominous_spaw: Produced when an ominous item spawner spawns an item during an ominous event.
options.particles.minecraft.poof.tooltip: Produced when mobs die and during various vanish or burst effects (e.g., silverfish entering stone, spawner spawns, certain roars, and fireworks expiring without stars).
options.particles.minecraft.portal.toolt: Produced by portals and teleportation. Also trails behind Eyes of Ender and appears around Ender Pearls, Ender Chests, Endermen, and Endermites.
options.particles.minecraft.raid_omen.to: Emitted by entities with the Raid Omen effect.
options.particles.minecraft.rain.tooltip: Appears on the ground during rain.
options.particles.minecraft.scrape.toolt: Produced when scraping oxidation from copper.
options.particles.minecraft.sculk_charge: Marks the path of a sculk charge.
Produced when a sculk charge ends.
options.particles.minecraft.sculk_soul.t: Appears above sculk catalysts when activated.
options.particles.minecraft.small_gust.t: Emitted by entities with the Wind Charged effect.
options.particles.minecraft.smoke.toolti: Emitted by many heat and magic sources (e.g., torches, campfires, furnaces, brewing stands, blazes, ghasts, withers, and lava). Also appears during certain actions such as primed TNT and portal-related effects.
options.particles.minecraft.snowflake.to: Produced by entities inside powder snow.
options.particles.minecraft.sonic_boom.t: Produced by the Warden’s sonic boom attack.
options.particles.minecraft.soul.tooltip: Produced when running with Soul Speed on soul sand or soul soil.
options.particles.minecraft.soul_fire_fl: Emitted by soul torches and other soul fire sources.
options.particles.minecraft.splash.toolt: Produzido por respingos de água, respingos de chuva, actividade de pesca e certos efeitos de impacto na água. Também produzido quando lobos molhados chacoalham.
options.particles.minecraft.spore_blosso: Floats in the air around spore blossoms.
options.particles.minecraft.squid_ink.to: Produced when a squid is hit.
options.particles.minecraft.sweep_attack: Produced when performing a sweeping attack.
options.particles.minecraft.tinted_leave: Falls from most leaf blocks (except pale oak and cherry) and matches the source leaf’s color.
options.particles.minecraft.totem_of_und: Produced when a Totem of Undying activates.
options.particles.minecraft.trail.toolti: Draws a line between two points, such as between the Creaking and its heart or when eyeblossoms open and close.
options.particles.minecraft.trial_omen.t: Emitted by entities with the Trial Omen effect.
options.particles.minecraft.trial_spawne: Produced when a trial spawner activates.
Detecção do gerador sombrio do desafio
Produced when an ominous trial spawner activates.
options.particles.minecraft.vault_connec: Produto quando um jogador está próximo de um cofre.
options.particles.minecraft.vibration.to: Travels from sound sources to sculk sensors or the Warden, and from note blocks to allays.
options.particles.minecraft.warped_spore: Floats in the air in Warped Forest biomes.
options.particles.minecraft.wax_off.tool: Produced when scraping wax off copper.
options.particles.minecraft.wax_on.toolt: Produced when applying wax to copper with honeycomb.
options.particles.minecraft.white_ash.to: Floats in the air in Basalt Deltas biomes.
Emitted by crafters when ejecting an item.
vulkan-extra.option.advanced_item_toolti: Shows an item’s identifier and durability in its tooltip.
vulkan-extra.option.cloud_distance.toolt: Sets how far from the player clouds are rendered.
vulkan-extra.option.cloud_height.tooltip: Sets the height at which clouds are rendered.
vulkan-extra.option.fog.tooltip:
Adjusts terrain fog distance per dimension.
Disable Multi Dimension Fog to control fog using Single Fog.
0: Use vanilla fog settings
1–32: Set fog distance in chunks
33: Maximum fog distance (effectively disables fog)
vulkan-extra.option.fog_start.tooltip: Controls how close to the player terrain fog begins.
vulkan-extra.option.fog_type.atmospheric: Controls fog caused by atmosphere and weather.
vulkan-extra.option.fog_type.cloud_end.t: Controls how far fog blends into clouds (end multiplier).
vulkan-extra.option.fog_type.default.too: Alterna a visibilidade e a distância do névoa para %s.
vulkan-extra.option.fog_type.dimension_o: Controls fog triggered by dimension effects or boss areas, such as the Ender Dragon fight.
vulkan-extra.option.fog_type.environment: Controls how far environment fog extends (end multiplier).
Controls when environment fog begins (start multiplier).
vulkan-extra.option.fog_type.lava.toolti: Controls fog when submerged in lava.
vulkan-extra.option.fog_type.powder_snow: Controls fog when inside powder snow.
vulkan-extra.option.fog_type.render_dist: Controls the render-distance border fade (end multiplier).
Controls the render-distance border fade (start multiplier).
vulkan-extra.option.fog_type.sky_end.too: Controls how far fog blends into the sky (end multiplier).
Shows name tags for item frames.
vulkan-extra.option.light_updates.toolti: Processes lighting updates. Disabling this may cause incorrect lighting when generating chunks. Only disable if you understand the impact.
vulkan-extra.option.limit_beacon_beam_he: Limite de altura do raio do sinalizador
Limits beacon beams to the world’s maximum height.
vulkan-extra.option.linear_flat_color_bl: Uses linear biome color blending without applying linear blending to block faces.
Enables per-dimension fog sliders. If disabled, the Single Fog slider is used.
After changing this option, close and reopen the menu to refresh the fog sliders.
vulkan-extra.option.overlay_corner.toolt: Sets which corner the overlay (FPS and coordinates) is shown in.
vulkan-extra.option.prevent_shaders.tool: Prevents vanilla shader effects from loading (e.g., spider-view distortion while spectating).
vulkan-extra.option.reduce_resolution_on:
Uses half resolution on Retina displays to improve performance on macOS.
Changing this option requires a restart.
vulkan-extra.option.show_coordinates.too: Shows player coordinates on the overlay.
vulkan-extra.option.show_fps.tooltip: Shows the current FPS on the overlay.
vulkan-extra.option.show_fps_extended.to: Shows additional FPS stats (max, average, and minimum) alongside the current FPS on the overlay.
vulkan-extra.option.single_fog.tooltip:
Adjusts terrain fog distance for all dimensions.
Enable Multi Dimension Fog to control fog per dimension.
0: Use vanilla fog settings
1–32: Set fog distance in chunks
33: Maximum fog distance (effectively disables fog)
vulkan-extra.option.steady_debug_hud.too: Refreshes the debug HUD at a fixed interval set by Steady Debug HUD Refresh Interval.
vulkan-extra.option.steady_debug_hud_ref: Sets how often the debug HUD refreshes (in ticks).
vulkan-extra.option.text_contrast.toolti:
Adjusts the readability of the FPS/coordinates overlay.
- None: Plain white text
- Background: Adds a debug-style background
- Shadow: Plain white text with a shadow
vulkan-extra.option.use_adaptive_sync.to: Allows V-Sync to switch mid-frame and disable itself at times, often improving responsiveness. May cause issues with some GPU drivers.
vulkan-extra.option.use_fast_random.tool: Uses a faster random function for block rendering. This may change how some randomly rotated textures look compared to vanilla.
vulkan-extra.suggestRSO.message: Installing Reese’s Sodium Options alongside Vulkan Extra is strongly recommended. With the growing number of features, Sodium’s video options screen can become difficult to navigate without it.
